relationships: kab:Lliɣ ẓriɣ dakken Tom yella yesɛa uguren
kab:Ulac win yellan da yesɛa isem-nni
kab:Ur yelli ara yesɛa Tom idrimen ilaqen
kab:Tom yesɛa arma 20 Tubeṛ akken ad tt-yegzem di ṛṛay
kab:Yezmer lḥal ad yili Tom yesɛa ayen nniḍen ara yexdem
kab:Yenna-d Tom dakken yesɛa kra ad k-t-id yefk
kab:Yenna-d Tom dakken yesɛa kra ad kent-t-id yefk
